title: SOL 4pk Large Collagen Chewy Rolls Beef, 25cm Long Lasting Dog Chew Treats, Tasty Chew Bones for Dogs, Rich Beef Flavour Training Rewards, Durable Chew Sticks for Large Breeds, Boredom Breaker
features: Dog Long Lasting Chews -Enjoy hours of chewing fun with our Collagen Chew Rolls, specially crafted for dogs who love to chew. These durable treats keep your furry friend engaged, helping to alleviate boredom & dog anxiety.

Supports Joint Health - Rich in collagen, these chews promote joint mobility and overall health, making them ideal for large and active dogs. They support strong bones and joints, enhancing your dog’s playtime and daily activities.

Delicious Beef Flavour - With an irresistible beef taste that dogs adore, these natural dog treats are a favourite reward. Treat your furry friend to something special that they will love, making training and bonding moments even more delightful.

Convenient Packaging - Each large dog chew is carefully packed to preserve freshness and flavour. These chews are always ready for your dog, whether during trips, training sessions, or daily rewards. Keep them in a cool, dry place.
Pet Reminders - Whether you're offering chew treats or chew sticks for dogs, always supervise your dog while chewing and make sure fresh water is available at all times.

These collagen chews promote joint mobility and support strong bones, keeping your dog active and healthy. Are these chews suitable for puppies? Yes, these rawhide-free chews are suitable for puppies and adult dogs, providing a delicious reward for all life stages. How should I store these dog chews? Simply keep the chews in a cool, dry place to preserve their freshness and flavour. What flavour are these collagen dog chews? They feature a savoury beef flavour that dogs adore, making them perfect for training, rewarding, or treating your furry friend. Do these chews help with dog boredom and anxiety? Yes, the durable chews provide long-lasting engagement, helping to reduce boredom and ease anxiety in both puppies and adult dogs.
